title: AN ACT RENAMING THE BASEY NATIONAL AGRICULTURAL SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BASEY, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, AS THE VALERIANO C. YANCHA MEMORIAL AGRICULTURAL SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 7724

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6740, August 04, 1989 ]

AN ACT RENAMING THE BASEY NATIONAL AGRICULTURAL SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BASEY, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, AS THE VALERIANO C. YANCHA MEMORIAL AGRICULTURAL SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Basey National Agricultural School in the Municipality of Basey, Province of Samar, is hereby renamed as the Valeriano C. Yancha Memorial Agricultural School.

SEC. 2. The Department of Education, Culture and Sports is hereby directed to take cognizance and implement the provision of Section 1 hereof.

SEC. 2. The Department of Education, Culture and Sports is hereby directed to take cognizance and implement the provision of Section 1 hereof.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JOVITO R. SALONGA

(Sgd.)

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on June 7, 1989 and June 8, 1989, respectively.

(Sgd.)

EDWIN P. ACOBA

(Sgd.)

QUIRINO D. ABAD SANTOS, JR.

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary of the House of Representatives

Approved: August 4, 1989

(Sgd.)

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
